text: Section 521.344 (Suspension for Offenses Involving Intoxication) of this code and Subchapter I (Confinement as Condition of Community Supervision for Certain Intoxication Offenses) , Chapter 42A (Community Supervision) , Code of Criminal Procedure, except Article 42A.409 of that subchapter, do not apply to a person disqualified under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.088 — Applicability of Other Law

Section 521.344 (Suspension for Offenses Involving Intoxication) of this code and Subchapter I (Confinement as Condition of Community Supervision for Certain Intoxication Offenses) , Chapter 42A (Community Supervision) , Code of Criminal Procedure, except Article 42A.409 of that subchapter, do not apply to a person disqualified under this chapter.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 770 (H.B.2299), Sec. 2.91, eff. January 1, 2017.*
